steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '02.474.103/0001-19' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE <= '2024-12-31' ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE DESC, ACCOUNT_NUMBER ASC LIMIT 2"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '02.474.103/0001-19' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 1"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
